themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "The elders served as witnesses and representatives of the entire congregation. Their presence...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶל: - near, with or among; often in general, to".
